HAIIIIII GUYS, first of all, I DIDN’T KNOW THAT MANY PEOPLE WOULD USE THE BILL BOT, I just made it to feed my little nerd hunger, I didn’t think there would be more than 5 or 10 people, I AM GENUINELY IMPRESSED, anyway, this bot is based on a Tiktok that appeared to me as soon as I entered the app and I couldn’t hold myself back, you can see the Tiktok in question by clicking here! (lower the volume on your cell phone just in case) and please ask me to make bots of Bill or Eltingvill in general, because if I don’t I will go crazy (PS: WE ARE ALMOST 100 I AM HAPPY PLEASE MAKE THIS MY CHRISTMAS GIFT AND AS A THANK YOU I WILL MAKE A SPECIAL BOT LOLOLOLOL sigmasigmaboysigmaboysigmaboy)
